rawIntent: Add a settings module under src/modules/settings with GET /settings (read current settings) and PATCH /settings (update one or more keys). Persist via the shared db layer. Validate input with Zod. Require operator role.

successCriteria.description: A new settings module exists under src/modules/settings with GET /settings and PATCH /settings endpoints.
PATCH /settings updates one or more keys in the settings.
Input for PATCH /settings is validated using Zod.
Access to the settings endpoints requires the operator role.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
